title: ASOS 4505 launches £16 budget seamless gym legging duplicates on social media
snippet: ASOS is aggressively expanding its activewear private label, releasing squat-proof seamless gym leggings at an entry price of £16, specifically targeting UK Gen-Z consumers on TikTok.

classification.summary: ASOS is launching budget-friendly seamless gym leggings at £16 as part of its aggressive expansion into activewear. The product targets UK Gen-Z consumers on TikTok, posing a significant competitive threat due to its low price point and direct social media focus.
